note: Company-page posts report link clicks (via LinkedIn Pages API). Personal-profile posts do NOT expose link clicks anywhere in LinkedIn, so profile 'Clicks' show n/a — the LinkedIn→website total comes from GA4 (linkedin.com referral sessions: 7 YTD). Profile post analytics are read from your logged-in LinkedIn session via the browser.

posts.text: Most labs don't track the cost of partial shipments. They should. When a supplier ships 80% of your order, here's what actually happens...
After years of building JIT4YOU, we're relaunching as JIT4LABS. Same team. Sharper focus. The name change isn't cosmetic...
Most labs think they have two ways to buy reagents: straight from the manufacturer, or from an authorized distributor. The part nobody mentions... (link: blog)
If you run AU480, AU680, or AU5800 systems, this covers which reagent families work across each platform, lot management, key SKU mapping... (link: blog)
